prompt_text:
### Demographics: 49-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 8 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~12.5 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 68.6 kg; Height 180.7 cm; BMI 21.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 132/60 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.9%; 9 months ago 6.9%; 6 months ago 6.9%; 3 months ago 6.7%; current 6.1%), FPG (12 months ago 139mg/dL; 9 months ago 146mg/dL; 6 months ago 136mg/dL; 3 months ago 173mg/dL; current 116mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 68.2kg; 9 months ago 68.2kg; 6 months ago 71.1kg; 3 months ago 67.8kg; current 68.6kg), Height (12 months ago 180.7cm; 9 months ago 180.7cm; 6 months ago 180.7cm; 3 months ago 180.7cm; current 180.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 21.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 136mmHg; 9 months ago 136mmHg; 6 months ago 134mmHg; 3 months ago 134mmHg; current 132mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 60mmHg; 9 months ago 60mmHg; 6 months ago 60mmHg; 3 months ago 60mmHg; current 60mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 108U/L; 9 months ago 111U/L; 6 months ago 112U/L; 3 months ago 120U/L; current 110U/L), AST (12 months ago 94U/L; 9 months ago 94U/L; 6 months ago 95U/L; 3 months ago 91U/L; current 89U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 40mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; current 38mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 244mg/g; 9 months ago 299mg/g; 6 months ago 213mg/g; 3 months ago 269mg/g; current 241mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 84mg/dL; 9 months ago 85mg/dL; 6 months ago 84mg/dL; 3 months ago 84mg/dL; current 86mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 42mg/dL; 9 months ago 42mg/dL; 6 months ago 39mg/dL; 3 months ago 39mg/dL; current 41mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 188mg/dL; 9 months ago 166mg/dL; 6 months ago 169mg/dL; 3 months ago 167mg/dL; current 177mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.2g/dL; current 11.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.53 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
